summary: .nojekyll present, brain-config complete, every app folder carries an index.html. The two medium straggler items are already knocked out. What remains is soft-cap and naming hygiene, nothing structural.

findings.body: repo-auditor.md lingered after the rename to recon-renata.md. Two profiles for one agent.
app-dashboard (22.8KB) and world-cup-bracket (21.5KB) are over the 15KB soft cap with no /source rendition. Neither reads back whole.
findings.fix: Generate /source chunk sets, or trim under 15KB.

findings.body: canary.txt at the repo root didn't belong.
f1-racetracks/source numbering jumps 11 to 13, no 12_. Likely deliberate, worth a glance.
findings.fix: Verify the chunk set is complete.

findings.body: f1-racetracks app commits carry no version number, plus 5 rapid debug commits in ~40 min: smells like an unresolved runtime bug.
findings.fix: Version app commits; confirm f1 is stable.

clean: brain-config/ has hooks, agents, gates + CHANGELOG, README, open-thread
Every app folder is kebab-case with an index.html
budget-code-mapper, file-chunker, pdf-splitter chunk sets all complete
